// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;

namespace TestAssembly;

/// <summary>
/// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
/// </summary>
public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Registers all default services.
    /// </summary>
    public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssemblyServices(this IServiceCollection services)
    {
        services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.NoTagService, global::TestNamespace.NoTagService>();
        services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.INoTagService, global::TestNamespace.NoTagService>();
        services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.Tag1Service, global::TestNamespace.Tag1Service>();
        services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.ITag1Service, global::TestNamespace.Tag1Service>();
        services.AddTransient<global::TestNamespace.Tag2Service, global::TestNamespace.Tag2Service>();
        services.AddTransient<global::TestNamespace.ITag2Service, global::TestNamespace.Tag2Service>();
        services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.BothTagsService, global::TestNamespace.BothTagsService>();
        services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IBothTagsService, global::TestNamespace.BothTagsService>();

        return services;
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Registers all services tagged with 'Tag1'.
    /// </summary>
    public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssemblyServices_Tag1(this IServiceCollection services)
    {
        services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.Tag1Service, global::TestNamespace.Tag1Service>();
        services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.ITag1Service, global::TestNamespace.Tag1Service>();
        services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.BothTagsService, global::TestNamespace.BothTagsService>();
        services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IBothTagsService, global::TestNamespace.BothTagsService>();

        return services;
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Registers all services tagged with 'Tag2'.
    /// </summary>
    public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssemblyServices_Tag2(this IServiceCollection services)
    {
        services.AddTransient<global::TestNamespace.Tag2Service, global::TestNamespace.Tag2Service>();
        services.AddTransient<global::TestNamespace.ITag2Service, global::TestNamespace.Tag2Service>();
        services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.BothTagsService, global::TestNamespace.BothTagsService>();
        services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IBothTagsService, global::TestNamespace.BothTagsService>();

        return services;
    }
}
